title: cornus × dubia
intro: Cornus × dubia, also known as the bleeding dogwood or dogwood, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Cornus genus. It is valued for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and providing antioxidant properties. Cornus × dubia is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to create extracts and tinctures.
